Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Agnos family]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — The Agnos family includes Andra and Lycus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — The Agnos family has a caravan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — The Agnos family is preparing to leave the camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — The Agnos family wailed when Simon summoned Azura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Simon worried he may have sent the Agnos family into even worse danger.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Erastes intended to move in with the Agnos family upon retirement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Simon had barely seen any of the Agnos family since his arrival.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The Agnos family is Simon's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Agnos family waits inside a room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — The Agnos family attended the Damascan awards ceremony.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
